note: Captured from the AU1 in-game shop with a 2x Payment Doubler active; 'rubies' below are the BASE pack amounts (the crossed-out figures), the doubler doubles them on the next purchase.

rubyRush.name: Large Ruby Rush
rubyRush.extras: Samurai tokens bonus 300% 4h, 1,000x Case of samurai tokens, 100x 60min skips

rubyRush.name: Extra Large Ruby Rush
rubyRush.extras: Samurai tokens bonus 400% 4h, 1,500x Chest of samurai tokens, 200x 60min skips

rubyRush.name: Huge Ruby Rush
rubyRush.extras: Samurai tokens bonus 500% 4h, 3,000x Chest of samurai tokens, 400x 60min skips

rubyRush.name: Giant Ruby Rush
rubyRush.extras: Samurai tokens bonus 600% 4h, 5,000x Case of the Shogun, 750x 60min skips

rubyRush.name: VIP Ruby Rush
rubyRush.extras: Samurai tokens bonus 1000% 4h, 17,500x Chest of the Shogun, 1,000x 60min skips

dailyBundles.note: 7-day escalating chain on the Daily Bundles tab; one purchase per day, bonus climbs each consecutive day.

subscriptions.name: Player Subscription #1
subscriptions.effects: Recruitment time -15%, +40 recruitment slot capacity, resource construction costs -10%, glory decrease -2%, food production +10%, more

subscriptions.name: Player Subscription #2
subscriptions.effects: Auto cooldown skip, auto equipment sale, auto spy report, loyalty gift up to +20%, more

subscriptions.name: Alliance Subscription
subscriptions.effects: Construction time skip +600s, research costs -5%, research speed +10%, public order +125 (main castle)
